text: We currently use GitFlow for our branching strategy: develop, feature branches, release branches, and hotfixes.
Nina's morning coffee order is vanilla lattes with oat milk, no syrup after noon.
Phoenix go-live date is 2026-05-01 with a code freeze starting one week earlier.
Our preferred code review tool is GitHub Pull Requests with mandatory 2 approvals.
The staging database resets every Sunday at 02:00 UTC.
The design team uses Figma libraries 'Nova' and 'Solar' for shared components.
